characters.name: Head Keeper Bob
characters.description: Head Keeper Bob Head Keeper Bobis the head game keeper atPrehistoric Park. He is in charge of feeding, cleaning, and containing the animals in the park, and is often the one who usually tidies up afterNigel. Bob has long suffered from his job, from dealing with the troublesometitanosaursto being attacked by a stowawayTroodon. However, Bob does have some good sides to his job, such as rearing two babyOrnithomimus, jousting with the Park's resident teenageTriceratops,Theo, and being the head keeper at the ultimate wildlife sanctuary. At the beginning of the episode, Bob works with the rest of the park staff to set the enclosures up and ensure the park is ready for its first arrivals. Later in the episode, afterTheotheTriceratopshad arrived, Bob creates a plan to help solve his desire for "jousting", after seeing the sub-adultTriceratopsramming his head into a tree. Bob and his team attach pipes and tires to a tractor, leading to the machine bearing some superficial resemblance to aTriceratops. This is used to match Theo's strength. Bob and Nigel ride it intoTriceratops Creekand have a "joust" with Theo. They are careful to ensure he wins in the end.

characters.name: Saba Douglas-Hamilton
characters.description: Saba Douglas-Hamilton and Nigel Marven looking at a deadSmilodoncub. Saba Douglas-Hamiltonis a big cat expert and an associate ofNigel MarveninPrehistoric Park. She is an expert at studying apex predators like big cats. On Nigel's second trip to prehistoric South America, Nigel invites Saba on his trip and she accompanies him to Prehistoric South America, 10,000 years ago, whensabre-toothed catswere on their last legs.

characters.name: Individual Creatures in Prehistoric Park
characters.description: It is stated that, one day,Nigel Marvenhopes to breed extinct animals in captivity. However,Prehistoric Parkas it is seen in theseries, is mostly a home for a few individuals that Nigel has brought back. TheArthropleurain the wild. AnArthropleuralives in theBughouse. It made an appearance in the episode "The Bug House". Nigel sees a forest fire, so he carries aPulmonoscorpiusin the cage. He observes some creatures escaping from the fire. Nigel tripped on something, but it was no ordinary fallen log. It was anArthropleura. Nigel realized that the giant arthropod buried itself in the leaves due to the heat, but that it would be burned alive unless Nigel could save it. Nigel pounces on theArthropleurawith a tarp, andJim, one of Nigel's crew members, ties it so it won't escape. It was then, along with the other rescued Carboniferous creatures, transported back to Prehistoric Park with the help of atitanosaur, and put in thebughouse. While checking on the bughouse's inhabitants,Bobsaid, in reference to theArthropleura, "I'm really rather fond of him. I think it's because he's big. He's not like any wiggly, little spider or something that creeps up behind you, like a proper animal."

characters.name: Martha
characters.description: Marthais an adult femalewoolly mammoth, rescued in "A Mammoth Undertaking", that resides inPrehistoric Park. Being the only mammoth at the park, she lives with the park's residentAfrican elephantherd to keep her company. In "A Mammoth Undertaking",Nigeltraveled back to Siberia 10,000 years ago, when the last of the woolly mammoths were struggling to survive. Nigel found Martha and a deceased female mammoth by a river. Nigel found out that the deceased mammoth, likely Martha's sister, was caught in a trap assembled byearly humansand was speared to death. Martha was defending her corpse. She looked very ill; her head was low, her ears were adjacent to her head, and she could barely move her trunk. Nigel slowly approached Martha. Whilst doing so, Martha struggled to stand and collapsed onto the ground. Nigel investigated the mammoth corpse and then found out that Martha had a spearhead embedded in her hide and was badly infected. Nigel then called his crew to come over. When his crew arrived and set up camp, Nigel tranquilized Martha and comforted her whilst she dozed off. During the evening, Nigel found out that lots of scavengers likecave hyenasandwolveswere prowling nearby. Nigel and his crew managed to keep them at bay by shining torches at them.

characters.name: Nigel Marven
characters.description: Nigel in his jeep. Nigel Marvenis a wildlife adventurer and the main host ofPrehistoricPark. His job involves traveling back in time and rescuing extinct animals from the brink of extinction. Nigel plans to start his adventures with an attempt to rescue aTyrannosaurus rex. Upon arrival in Montana65 million years ago, Nigel heads to a forest to begin his search. He is soon able to locate a flock ofOrnithomimus. While attempting to capture one by slipping a sock over its head, a small pack ofT. rexarrive. Nigel escapes by running into thick undergrowth.

characters.name: Nigel Marven
characters.description: Nigel in his jeep. Nigel Marvenis a wildlife adventurer and the main host ofPrehistoricPark. His job involves traveling back in time and rescuing extinct animals from the brink of extinction. Nigel plans to start his adventures with an attempt to rescue aTyrannosaurus rex. While attempting to capture one by slipping a sock over its head, a small pack ofT. rexarrive. Nigel escapes by running into thick undergrowth.

characters.name: Matilda
characters.description: Matilda about to finish off her brother,Terrence. ("The Bug House") Matildais a femaleTyrannosaurusrescued in "T-Rex Returns". She was one of the first dinosaurs inPrehistoric Parkalong with her brother,Terrence. Matilda made her debut in "T-Rex Returns". WhenNigel Marvenfinds Terrence and Matilda, they are both half-starved. Their mother was about to feed them anOrnithomimuscarcass, but a maleTyrannosaurusshowed up. He wanted the carcass, but the mother wouldn't allow it. The two adults engage in a huge, violent fight. Matilda and Terence both stay hidden, for if the male notices them, they would most likely be killed. It is a long fight, but their mother, already having an injured leg, ends up losing the battle, and is knocked to the ground. She gives off one final roar before succumbing to her injuries. The two babies are now orphaned. Miles away, the meteorite hits Earth. The deadly shock wave is only three minutes away from where they are. Nigel tries to lure the twoT. rexwith the only thing he has: a sandwich containing meat. The two dinosaurs hesitate at first, but then they both made a lunge for the sandwich (or, more likely, Nigel). And as the shock wave approaches, Terrence and Matilda are both rescued. They are then fed in the observation pens before being put intoT-Rex Hill. Once there, Terence and Matilda are given their names. It isn't all cute though, the two Tyrannosaurs will double their weight every year until full-sized, turning Matilda & Terence into the most dangerous killing machines in 65 million years. Let's all hopePrehistoric Parkknows what tussle it just put itself into!

characters.name: Head Veterinarian Suzanne
characters.description: Head Vetrinarian Suzanneis the head veterinarian ofPrehistoric Park. She is responsible for treating animals when they're sick or injured. Suzanne has had many assignments all over the park, from giving the park's residentwoolly mammothMarthaa haircut to raising the park's two babySmilodon. She has anassistant veterinarianto help with some tasks. Suzanne checks onTheoshortly after his arrival in Prehistoric Park. She also notes his aggressive behavior due to the lack of other maleTriceratopsto fight. Suzanne observes whenBobandNigeluse the Triceratops Tractor to "mimic" a rivalTriceratops. AfterMarthais rescued, Suzanne helps remove the arrowhead which the Pleistocenehuman huntersattacked her with. Suzanne later joins Bob and Nigel in a discussion about integrating Martha into the herd ofAfrican Elephantsresiding in the park. She and Nigel support the idea, whereas Bob initially expresses concern about possible interference with the already established social structure. But, they eventually all agree that there is no other option.

characters.name: Prehistoric Park Staff
characters.description: In addition toNigel Marven,Head Keeper Bob, andHead Veterinarian Suzanne,Prehistoric Parkalso has some other staff members that are not given as much screen time, but certainly play a big role in the success of the park. Some of them assist Nigel on his expeditions while others assist Bob and Suzanne in the day-to-day functions of the park back in the 21st century. He was played by actor Morgan Williams. In the special,Building the Impossible, it was revealed that Williams was a local actor from New Zealand, where part of the episode was shot. The blonde assistant is a veterinarian who works withSuzanneas an assistant. She appeared in every episode except forepisode 1. Her name is never mentioned in the series or in any other Prehistoric Park-related media.

characters.name: Prehistoric Park Staff

characters.name: Terrence
characters.description: Terrence (on the left) and his sister,Matilda Terrenceis a maleTyrannosaurusthat was rescued in "T-Rex Returns". As such, he was one ofthe park'sfirst dinosaurs, as well asMatilda'slong-suffering younger brother. Terrence made his debut in "T-Rex Returns". WhenNigel Marvenfirst found him and his older sister,Matilda, they were both half-starved, due to their mother's limited ability to hunt thanks to her injury. Their mother was about to feed them anOrnithomimuscarcass, but a maleTyrannosaurusshowed up. He wanted the carcass. The mother wouldn't allow it. The two adults engaged in a huge, violent fight. Matilda and Terrence both remained hidden, as the male would most likely kill them if they were discovered. Their mother lost the battle and was knocked to the ground, giving off one final roar, before succumbing to her injuries. The two babies were then orphaned. Miles away, the meteorite responsible for the KT extinction hit Earth. With the deadly shock wave only three minutes away, Nigel tried to lure the twoTyrannosauruschicks with a sandwich, the only thing he had with him containing meat. The two dinosaurs hesitated at first, but then they both made a lunge for the sandwich, or Nigel, possibly because of the smell of the meat. They were both rescued and fed in the observation pens before being put intoT-Rex Hill. Once there, Terrence and Matilda were given their names. However, the narrator noted that the twoTyrannosauruswould double their weight every year until reaching full-sized, turning them into the most dangerous killing machines in 65 million years.

However, the narrator noted that the twoTyrannosauruswould double their weight every year until reaching full-sized, turning them into the most dangerous killing machines in 65 million years.

characters.name: Theo
characters.description: Theo inTriceratops Creek("Supercroc") Theois an adolescent maleTriceratopsthat was rescued in "T-Rex Returns". He wasPrehistoric Park'sfirst ever dinosaur, and prehistoric animal overall. Theo made his debut in "T-Rex Returns", where he was first seen feeding on foliage when an injured femaleTyrannosaurustried to attack him. Seeing a rescue opportunity,Nigelthought he could rescue two species for the price of one, by using Theo to lure theTyrannosaurus rexback to Prehistoric Park. Unfortunately, theTyrannosaurusdidn't take the bait and remained in the Cretaceous while Theo, on the other hand, went through the portal, and was declared the park's first ever prehistoric creature. After arriving at the park,Bobeagerly transports Theo to his new enclosure,Triceratops Creek. Later on in the episode, Bob watches the monitors in the control room, and notices Theo charging into a tree in his enclosure. Bob and Suzanne both head down to see what is troubling theTriceratops. Suzanne notices that Theo's frill has changed color, and believes that he is experiencing a surge of testosterone. This gives Bob an idea and he devises a plan to calm down Theo. After Nigel returns from his second rescue attempt, Suzanne tells him to check out Theo. As the two observe Theo, he charges right at them, only to be stopped by the fence. Like Suzanne, Nigel believes that Theo is experiencing a testosterone surge, by comparing Theo to a time when Nigel hand-reared a female baby fox that grew little aggressive as it matured. Suddenly, Bob shows up on a tire-padded tractor made to look like aTriceratops. As he drives up to them, he tells Nigel to hop on and tells Suzanne to open the gate. Bob and Nigel then enter the enclosure and joust with Theo, until the adolescent dinosaur has calmed down. Theo was then able to settle in.
